---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, resource, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the use case. Who would call this tool, and why?

## Proposed solution

What should the tool, resource, or behavior look like? If you have a sketch of the input and output schema, paste it here.

## Regulation reference

Which articles, annexes, or recitals of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 are involved?

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried solving this another way? What worked or did not?

## Additional context

Anything else we should know.
